name: pi-web-chat
description: Trusted pi-web chat and prompt composer plugin with !, /, and @ backend support.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outfile index.js --target browser --format esm --sourcemap=none --minify
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run validate
scripts.pretest: npm run build && npm run build:backend
scripts.prevalidate: npm run build && npm run build:backend
